title: Shorthand promises should be preferred
description: In JavaScript, a promise is an object representing the eventual completion or failure of an asynchronous operation. It is a way to handle asynchronous operations more elegantly and avoid the "callback hell". A promise can be in one of three states: Pending: The initial state of a promise.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Replace Promise constructor function expressions with arrow functions for better readability
Replace .then() function expressions with arrow functions for better readability
Replace .catch() function expressions with arrow functions for better readability
Replace Promise method function expressions with arrow functions for better readability
